What I Do

Where strategy
meets creativity

📱

Social Media Management

End-to-end content planning — Stories, Posts, Reels — across platforms with consistent calendars and tone of voice.

📅

Content Calendar & Strategy

Full-month editorial planning with format mix, caption strategy, posting schedules, and performance tracking.

✍️

Brand Storytelling

Trend-driven, audience-first captions and content that strengthen brand voice and drive real engagement.

📊

Analytics & Optimisation

Monthly performance reports, audience behaviour tracking, and data-led decisions to improve reach continuously.

🎭

Meme & Viral Content

Relatable, trend-aware content that converts followers into fans — fun, on-brand, and always strategic.

🚀

Creative Campaigns

Platform-specific campaign ideation adapting tone and style per brand identity — fresh and growth-focused.

Career Journey

Where I've built
brands & made impact

Nov 2025 – Present
The Marketing Pros
Current Role
Social Media Marketing Executive
  • Creating and managing daily content — Stories, Posts, Reels — across multiple platforms with a consistent, engaging calendar.
  • Writing trend-driven, audience-focused captions that deepen brand communication and boost interaction.
  • Driving follower growth through creative campaigns tailored to target audiences and unique brand identities.
  • Monitoring analytics to optimise performance and continuously improve reach and visibility.
Jul – Sep 2025
Studify Success
EdTech
Digital Marketing Intern
  • Managed brand's Instagram end-to-end — content planning, meme creation, scheduling, and community interaction.
  • Created and published engaging Posts and Reels to grow brand presence and audience engagement.
  • Generated student leads through targeted telecalling campaigns and enrolment counselling.
Apr – Jul 2025
Creative Draft Co.
Creative Agency
Social Media Marketing Intern
  • Managed content across diverse client Instagram accounts, adapting tone to match each unique brand identity.
  • Tracked performance metrics to refine posting strategies and improve organic reach.
  • Drove measurable follower growth through fresh, creative content produced consistently at pace.
Jan – Mar 2024
Efsolit Technology Pvt. Ltd.
E-Commerce & Tech
Digital Marketing Intern
  • Planned and managed social media campaigns optimised for engagement, reach, and follower growth across platforms.
  • Managed e-commerce product listings with SEO keywords, descriptions, and pricing to maximise visibility.
  • Compiled monthly analytics reports tracking performance, audience behaviour, and ROI for data-driven decisions.
